description:
This table details the technical specifications for format consistency of a raster geographic dataset.
| Category | Specification |
|:--------------------------|:-----------------------------------------------|
| File format | Raster GeoTIFF 16-bit |
| Coordinate Reference System (CRS) | ETRS 1989 LAEA (Lambert Azimuthal Equal Area) EPSG 3035 |
| Minimum Mapping Unit (MMU) | 10 x 10 m |
| Mapping area | Compliant |
| Height value range | 3.0 – 125.0 m |
| Metadata | Compliant |
| No Data value | 65535 |
The table outlines data characteristics such as the file format (Raster GeoTIFF 16-bit), the Coordinate Reference System (ETRS 1989 LAEA with EPSG 3035), the Minimum Mapping Unit (10 x 10 m), and a height value range from 3.0 m to 125.0 m. It also indicates that the mapping area and metadata are "Compliant," and specifies "65535" as the No Data value.
